title: left shift for IP addresses not available to non-system users
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE ip_test (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, ip_address TEXT NOT NULL, user_type TEXT CHECK (user_type IN ('system', 'non-system')));
SELECT * FROM ip_test WHERE user_type = 'non-system' AND ip_address LIKE '192.168.%';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ip_test WHERE user_type = 'non-system' AND ip_address IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: left shift operation on IP addresses for non-system users
